message:
perf: micro-optimizations across host, store, raptorq, oauth, streaming, and manifest

Seven targeted allocation and algorithmic improvements:

fcp-host/batch.rs:
- Pre-allocate in_degree and dependents HashMaps with_capacity(
  operations.len()) in topological tier computation

fcp-host/supervisor.rs:
- Fix ExponentialBackoff::new() to clamp initial = initial.min(max),
  preventing initial delay exceeding max delay
- New test: backoff_initial_above_max_clamps_immediately

fcp-store/repair.rs:
- Add is_sorted check before sort_unstable() in RepairSloMetrics to
  skip sort when samples already ordered
- Convert hot-object lookup from O(n) linear scan to O(1) HashSet

fcp-raptorq/codec/gf256.rs:
- Add #[inline] to pow(), gf256_add_slice_scalar(),
  gf256_mul_slice_scalar(), gf256_addmul_slice_scalar() — hot GF(256)
  arithmetic in encode/decode inner loops

fcp-oauth/oauth2.rs:
- Replace Vec<&str> collect + join for OAuth scope string with direct
  String accumulation, eliminating intermediate allocation

fcp-streaming/stream.rs:
- Replace std::mem::take + manual re-alloc with single
  std::mem::replace(..., Vec::with_capacity(...)) in batch stream flush

fcp-manifest/lib.rs:
- Change ip_allow.sort_unstable() to ip_allow.sort() for stable
  ordering of String IPs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
